name: crystallize
description: Build a durable .context knowledge graph from a stable, self-authored codebase — domains, patterns, component index, and decision trees that make reuse the default and forking a justified exception. Maps a Tier-1 skeleton by grep/glob, mines intent, detects semantic duplicate clusters, and only persists curated judgment after a referee verifies it against the code and a human approves it.

interface.shortDescription: Build a .context graph; make reuse the default and forking a justified exception.
interface.longDescription: Crystallize turns a stable, self-authored codebase into a durable .context knowledge graph — domains, patterns, a component index, and decision trees — that makes reuse the default and forking a loud, justified exception. It maps a Tier-1 verifiable skeleton by grep/glob, mines business and UI intent, detects semantic duplicate clusters, and persists curated judgment only after a referee re-derives each claim against the code and a human approves it. crystallize builds the graph, crystallize-guard enforces anti-fork day to day, and crystallize-apply runs a resumable consolidation campaign with a behavior gate per step.
defaultPrompt: Use Crystallize to build a .context graph for this codebase.
Crystallize my modais (or any component family).
Guard: does a canonical form for this already exist before I build it?
